definitions: adj. 良性的（在此语境下的释义）

examples.text:
On top of that, talking about menstrual
cramps can feel awkward or even taboo, leading many people to feel that they
have to simply put up with the pain. But regularly suffering from
severe cramping is far from benign. Some experts believe
that repeated exposure to pain can cause the nervous system
to become more sensitive,
examples.explanation: adj. 良性的（在此语境下的释义）

source.text: 3 things that can cause painful periods - Chen X. Chen
